page_metadata.biotools__summary: Visualization tool for displaying loss-of-heterozygosity and/or allelic imbalance (LOH/AI) by making use of VCF files originating from primarily diagnostic panels, although it works on any input.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Visualization tool for displaying loss-of-heterozygosity and/or allelic imbalance (LOH/AI) by making use of VCF files originating from primarily diagnostic panels, although it works on any input.
